creator: chris@securityforensics.co.uk
text:
I have a HP 1022 LaserJet printer connected via USB. Since upgrading to
FreeBSD 7.0 I get the following message during system boot:

uhub2: <VIA EHCI root hub, class 9/0, rev 2.00/1.00, addr 1> on usb2
uhub2: 4 ports with 4 removable, self powered
uhub2: device problem (TIMEOUT), disabling port 1

The printer connects (normally) via the ugen device which I have generated
into my new kernel. The ugen module shows in the kldstat -v listing. No
/dev/ugen device is created.
